ensure_coauthor_trailer: ensure a git commit command includes a Co-Authored-By trailer in the commit message
check_is_git_commit: check if a shell command string is a git commit invocation
handle_m_flag_commits: handle git commit commands that use the -m flag with quoted commit messages
handle_heredoc_commits: handle git commit commands that use heredoc style for multi-line commit messages
fallback_trailer_flag: append a --trailer flag to git commit commands as a fallback for git 2.32+
